name: Orthotics LT/RT
description: Validation of LT/RT modifiers versus bilateral billing in Orthotics.

overpayment_conditions.missing_modifier_mismatch: Code billed with LT or RT mod and then same code without modifier, where Dx does not indicate bilateral condition.
overpayment_conditions.dx_bilateral_exception: Dx indicated bilateral condition, allowing use of both LT and RT billing patterns (Not an overpayment).

explanation_templates.valid: Bilateral billing pattern supported by diagnosis code.
explanation_templates.duplicate: Claim billed without modifier after LT/RT modifier claim already processed for same code.
